ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rules" (
  "rule_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the rule */,
  "proposed_analyzer" TEXT /* Proposed analyzer for the rule */,
  "existing_analyzer" TEXT /* Existing analyzer for the rule */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the rule */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the rule */,
  "vs_built_in" TEXT /* Indicates if the rule is part of the VS built-in ruleset */,
  "triggered" INTEGER /* Number of times the rule was triggered */,
  "suppressed" INTEGER /* Number of times the rule was suppressed */,
  "percent_suppressed" REAL /* Percentage of suppressions out of total triggers */,
  "rank" REAL /* Rank of the rule based on importance */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the rule (e.g., Usage, Naming) */,
  "revised_priority" TEXT /* Revised priority of the rule */,
  "original_priority" TEXT /* Original priority of the rule */,
  "ported" TEXT /* Indicates if the rule has been ported */,
  "default_state" TEXT /* Default state of the rule (e.g., enabled, disabled) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the rule */,
  "dependency" TEXT /* Dependencies of the rule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the rule */,
  "last_reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last review of the rule */,
  "reviewer" TEXT /* The user who last reviewed the rule */,
  "last_triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last time the rule was triggered */,
  "last_suppressed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last time the rule was suppressed */,
  "recommended_action" TEXT /* Detailed recommendation for fixing violations */,
  "example_code" TEXT /* Example of code that violates the rule */,
  "example_fix" TEXT /* Example of how to fix the violation */,
  "documentation_link" TEXT /* Link to detailed documentation or external resources */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rules_existing_analyzer FOREIGN KEY ("existing_analyzer") REFERENCES analyzers ("analyzer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rules_original_priority FOREIGN KEY ("original_priority") REFERENCES priorities ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rules_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rules_revised_priority FOREIGN KEY ("revised_priority") REFERENCES priorities ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rules_proposed_analyzer FOREIGN KEY ("proposed_analyzer") REFERENCES analyzers ("analyzer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rules_default_state FOREIGN KEY ("default_state") REFERENCES rule_states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyzers" (
  "analyzer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each analyzer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the analyzer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analyzer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the analyzer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the analyzer */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the analyzer */,
  "last_reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last review of the analyzer */,
  "reviewer" TEXT /* The user who last reviewed the analyzer */,
  "documentation_link" TEXT /* Link to detailed documentation or external resources */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyzer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the category */,
  "last_reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last review of the category */,
  "reviewer" TEXT /* The user who last reviewed the category */,
  "documentation_link" TEXT /* Link to detailed documentation or external resources */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priorities" (
  "priority_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each priority */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the priority was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the priority */,
  "last_reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last review of the priority */,
  "reviewer" TEXT /* The user who last reviewed the priority */,
  "documentation_link" TEXT /* Link to detailed documentation or external resources */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rule_states" (
  "state_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the state was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the state */,
  "last_reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last review of the state */,
  "reviewer" TEXT /* The user who last reviewed the state */,
  "documentation_link" TEXT /* Link to detailed documentation or external resources */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rule_dependency" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "rule_id" TEXT /* ID of the rule that has the dependency */,
  "dependency_rule_id" TEXT /* ID of the rule that is a dependency */,
  "dependency_analyzer_id" TEXT /* ID of the analyzer that is a dependency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the dependency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the dependency */,
  "last_reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last review of the dependency */,
  "reviewer" TEXT /* The user who last reviewed the dependency */,
  "documentation_link" TEXT /* Link to detailed documentation or external resources */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rule_dependency_dependency_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_rule_id") REFERENCES rules ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rule_dependency_dependency_analyzer_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_analyzer_id") REFERENCES analyzers ("analyzer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rule_dependency_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES rules ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rule_triggers" (
  "trigger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trigger event */,
  "rule_id" TEXT /* ID of the rule being triggered */,
  "triggered_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the rule was triggered */,
  "suppressed_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the rule was suppressed */,
  "percent_suppressed" REAL /* Percentage of suppressions out of total triggers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the trigger event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the trigger event */,
  "last_reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last review of the trigger event */,
  "reviewer" TEXT /* The user who last reviewed the trigger event */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the rule was triggered */,
  "suppressed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the rule was suppressed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trigger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rule_triggers_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES rules ("rule_id")
)
